reference: Hello Doctor, most of the time, I have sneezing and a runny nose with clear mucus for the past two to three years. I took cetirizine for it, but sometimes I feel better. However, I face the same problem again. Presently, I am not taking any medication. I am twenty-five years old and I am a male. I do not have a past medical history or reports. During this period, I am also sometimes facing inhalation problems.
text: Hello Doctor, most of the time I have sneezing and a runny nose with clear mucus for the past 2 to 3 years. I took cetirizine for it, but sometimes I feel better. However, I face the same problem again. Presently, I am not taking any medication. I am 25 years old and I am a male. I do not have a past medical history or reports. During this period, I am also sometimes facing inhalation problems.
